MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD

Appearances:
Patrick Hormillosa, of Lepera & Associates, Tel. 415.362.2529, for defendants;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The matter was discussed. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: JOSEPH A. LEPERA, ESQ. AND LEPERA + ASSOCIATES, PC'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR SCHELSEA SILVA DBA ESTOYDEMODA, ESTOYDEMODA, SUANI VARGAS DBA LA BEBA PRODUCTIONS, AND OSCAR BELTRAN DBA LOSPRAA PRODUCTIONS is granted.
